response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack development experience with strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React (via Ember.js), and PostgreSQL alternatives. His background includes scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes), aligning well with the role's technical requirements. However, his recent experience skews toward senior-level roles, and the renewable energy/construction tech domain is underrepresented in his portfolio.
strengths: Strong fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple high-scale projects
Experience with cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes) and scalable architectures
Demonstrated ability to learn rapidly and adapt to new technologies, with contributions to AI and automation tools
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role; may seek higher compensation or more senior responsibilities
Limited direct experience with renewable energy/construction technology platforms
Recent role at Naver (April 2025–present) may not reflect current availability for new roles

key_factors.factor: Cloud and scalable architecture knowledge (AWS, Kubernetes)
Experience level alignment with junior/mid-level role
